title: Bhagavad Gita 2.47-53: Act Without Attachment
description: Krishna's core teaching: you have the right to action alone, never to its fruits.
introduction: Krishna's core teaching: you have the right to action alone, never to its fruits.

translation.original_text: karmaṇy evādhikāras te mā phaleṣu kadācana
translation.text: You have the right to action alone, never to its fruits.
